posts.body:
Hi there !
I played with a group for the first time tonight. They played before, me too, but we had a few rules debates. 
Can you settle those for us, please?

First, gold tokens.
You get a gold token when reserving a card, but when can use it:
A) whenever you buy a card
B) only after buying the card you reserved 

Second, nobles.
A) you can have only one noble per game
B) you can get one noble per turn

Third, nobles again.
A) you need a noble to win the game
B) you can win without having a noble

What do you think?

Have fun!

You get a gold token when reserving a card, you can use it:
A) whenever you buy a card

Nobles.
B) you can get one noble per turn

Nobles
B) you can win without having a noble

I think the rules are very clear, so maybe someone's been using some house rules.
